---
title: '2014/03/25 Journal Tue Stop trying to be who you already are.'
date: '2014-03-25T12:56:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2711749633843823700'
blogger_filename: '/2014/03/20140325-journal-tue-stop-trying-to-be.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<h4>
VOD:</h4>
COME:<br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.bible.com/bible/1/rom.4.kjv" target="_blank">Romans 4</a><br />
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
4Now to him that worketh is the reward not reckoned of grace, but of debt.
5But to him that worketh not, but believeth on him that justifieth the ungodly, his faith is counted for righteousness.</blockquote>
<br />
<br />
HERE:<br />
<br />
Am I working too hard? Working so hard to become His child, that I fail to realize I AM His child?<br />
<br />
I'm trying to be, instead of renewing my mind to who I have become?<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
DO:<br />
<br />
Maybe today I'll read more about who I am?<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Thankful:</h4>
I'm thankful for my new job at TD Ameritrade. I expect they'll be calling me to offer it soon. I felt like the interview was anointed.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Feeling:</h4>
My neck, head, and body hurt. I need to start taking care of myself, because I don't think I ought to hurt this much, this often. Blood showed higher levels of liver somethings that indicate I've been taking way too much pain killers.<br />
<br />
<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
Going to work in a few minutes. I'm just going to talk to people today. Sales will do whatever they do. I'm going to engage the conversation. Be spirit led. See where we find ourselves by days end.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
Got an offer for the Car. Asked $1000, offered $500-600. I'll probably take it, but I was hoping for a bit more.<br />
<br />
<br />
Put my electric guitar on craigs list. Traded it for a KONA Acoustic-Electric. WOW! What a good trade. I am really enjoying playing an acoustic again. And this KONA is a really good brand. Never heard of it before, but it plays like a dream!<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3276-700f13d09da4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3276-700f13d09da4.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3277-28b17228b079.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3277-28b17228b079.jpg" height="320" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3278-b6b928f9fc5b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3278-b6b928f9fc5b.jpg" height="320" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3279-2a28e0950b03.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3279-2a28e0950b03.jpg" height="320" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3280-c3d4373f7280.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3280-c3d4373f7280.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3281-5cc76206ef9e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-3281-5cc76206ef9e.jpg" height="240" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
